variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 160086 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 160086 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 160086 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 410.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 384.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 286.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 184.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 181.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 151.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P958829 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 160086
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P958829 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 160086
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P958829 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.
